templates.desc: Clients, projects, time, and invoices.

templates.name: Briefing
templates.desc: A scannable catch-up on your calendar, inbox, and messages — waiting for you each evening.

templates.name: Evening wrap-up
templates.desc: Reflects on what got done today and stages tomorrow’s top three so mornings start sharp.

templates.name: Email triage
templates.desc: Sorts your inbox by urgency and drafts replies for anything that genuinely needs one.

templates.name: Meeting prep
templates.desc: Each weekday morning, gathers context, recent threads, and open questions for the day’s meetings.

templates.name: PR review digest
templates.desc: Surfaces open pull requests, who is blocked on whom, and what is ready to merge.

templates.name: Release notes drafter
templates.desc: Drafts user-facing release notes the moment a pull request merges into main.

templates.name: Dependency update check
templates.desc: Scans for outdated packages, security patches, and breaking changes before they bite.

templates.name: System health check
templates.desc: Watches infrastructure and services for errors, outages, and creeping performance issues.

templates.name: Issue triage
templates.desc: Reviews incoming bugs and feature requests, labels them, and routes the urgent ones.

templates.name: Flaky test tracker
templates.desc: Finds tests that pass and fail intermittently across recent CI runs and ranks the worst.
